user.title: Kohler Konnect
user.description: Enter your Kohler Konnect account credentials. The APIM subscription key and B2C refresh token are required for shower control. See the documentation for how to capture them.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Kohler Konnect
reauth_confirm.description: Your Kohler B2C refresh token has expired or was revoked. Capture a new one with `python -m kohler_anthem.b2c_signin` and paste it below.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check your credentials and APIM key, then try again.
error.invalid_b2c_refresh_token: The B2C refresh token was rejected. Capture a fresh one and try again.
error.no_devices: No devices found on this account.
